notes: v1.13.0: Dashboards now count real blocks — accurate per-block analytics with a live-preview widget gallery and new block-type / contains filters. Smarter dates (ambiguous text like "16/8" stays text; "Text" dates read exactly as typed), Select tags (Priority/Severity), follow-up chains, a tidier Summon with richer templates and a rewritten welcome note, plus a notification startup-crash fix.
